# Kurowii | Creative Developer & UI/UX Designer

> Cloue Macadangdang (Kurowii) is a Freelance Creative Developer specializing in high-performance website upgrades and custom React development.

## Identity
- **Name:** Cloue Macadangdang
- **Brand:** Kurowii
- **Role:** Creative Developer & UI/UX Designer
- **Location:** Vancouver, BC (Worldwide Services)
- **Website:** https://freelance.kurowii.com/

## Core Expertise
- **Custom React Development:** Building scalable, fast, and interactive web applications.
- **Website Modernization:** Transforming legacy sites into modern, high-converting digital assets.
- **UI/UX Design:** User-centric design solutions focused on accessibility and conversion.
- **Performance Optimization:** Ensuring websites are lightning-fast and SEO-friendly.

## Services
- **E-commerce Solutions:** Custom online stores with modern payment integrations.
- **Business Websites:** Professional digital presence for startups and established brands.
- **Portfolio Design:** Unique, interactive portfolios for creatives and professionals.

## Key Projects
- **Personal Portfolio:** Modern, fast, and accessible portfolio showcase.
- **Cloudy Toy Co:** Full-featured e-commerce store with newsletter and payment systems.
- **LUMIX:** Movie discovery platform using global film databases.
